lines: +export function formatRelative(ms: number, nowMs: number): string {

content.text: Added `formatRelative` to `src/format.ts`, exported alongside `formatTimestamp`. It computes the elapsed time from `nowMs - ms` and returns floored `"<n>s ago"` / `"<n>m ago"` / `"<n>h ago"` for sub-second/minute/hour ranges, falling back to `formatTimestamp(ms)` at 24 hours or more.

result: Added `formatRelative` to `src/format.ts`, exported alongside `formatTimestamp`. It computes the elapsed time from `nowMs - ms` and returns floored `"<n>s ago"` / `"<n>m ago"` / `"<n>h ago"` for sub-second/minute/hour ranges, falling back to `formatTimestamp(ms)` at 24 hours or more.
